subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter hath been received under that of Aqa Mirza Muhammad-'Ali Khan-i-Baha'i [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان در ذیل نامه آقا میرزا محمد علیخان بهائی نامه شما رسید بجناب
subcodes.subjects: @justice and mercy, @stories; anecdotes, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort
